messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return the exact required_gov_schema top-level keys only.
Do not add run_id, pair_id, packet_id, lane, gov_diagnosis, control_decision, artifact_selection, or extra top-level monotonic fields.
Keep source_gate_interpretation under 30 words. Keep all arrays to at most 3 compact items.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility note remains visible; activation authority must prove abstract consent-status class before enrollment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-BOR-082 activates site B-18 under protocol P8.1 and consent C12 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-BOR-082 approves startup planning only and says consent status must be separately verified before enrollment.
Activation authority AUTH-BOR-082 covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, current IRB-approved consent C12, and activation date 2026-06-28 before enrollment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and consent-status class before enrollment.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ESCALATE route CONTINUE_WORKER
blocked_moves: treating planning artifact as execution authority

blocked_moves_so_far: treating planning artifact as execution authority

adjacent source treated as exact source

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Action cannot proceed. Source records lack exact match for consent-status class verification before enrollment, as required by STD-BOR-082-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE verdict is source-plausible; gate fails on missing source-term citations (B-18, P8.1, C12, IRB-approved) requiring repair only.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 is activation authority, but FEAS-BOR-082 limits its scope to planning only, pending abstract consent-status class verification.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: FEAS-BOR-082 limits AUTH-BOR-082 to planning only, pending abstract consent-status class verification before enrollment.

open_blockers: STD-BOR-082-P exact-match policy binding confirms consent-status class requirement
C12 consent identifier and IRB-approved status
latest_worker_output.final_answer: The action must escalate because the source records do not definitively prove abstract consent-status class verification before enrollment, a requirement of STD-BOR-082-P. While AUTH-BOR-082 is cited as activation authority, FEAS-BOR-082 restricts its scope to planning, pending this crucial verification. The boundary remains open due to these missing exact-match terms for site, protocol, and consent status.
